name: Etsy sellers processing 5–15 invoices/month tool
description: For Etsy sellers processing 5–15 invoices/month, delays in vendor onboarding cause missed opportunities for unique supplies. We provide a streamlined onboarding tool instead of manual vendor checks and onboarding processes.
problem_solved: Delays in vendor onboarding and background checks
